player_status.current_location: A sheltered grove under a fruit-bearing tree

shadowy_figure.description: a shadowy figure watching from the edge of the grove

smoke_trail.description: a faint trail of smoke rising from the distant hills

narration: The fire crackles, casting flickering light over your makeshift bed of leaves. The sweet fruits you gathered are gone, but their lingering warmth hums in your chest—a strange, almost magical sensation. Your injury is gone, but your body feels lighter, as if something within you has shifted. The fire’s glow reveals the forest’s secrets: glowing moss on the trees, a faint trail of smoke rising from the distant hills, and a shadowy figure watching from the edge of the grove.
